articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
articles.title: Hackers are exploiting recently patched WordPress bugs, putting millions of websites at risk - TechCrunch
articles.description: Two critical security flaws in WordPress’ software have given hackers the chance to remotely take over tens of millions of websites, according to an estimate by a cybersecurity researcher.
articles.content: Hackers are breaking into websites that run vulnerable versions of the popular blogging software WordPress, according to several cybersecurity firms. One estimate puts the number of vulnerable WordPr… [+2356 chars]
